titles.en: Chapter on Precaution in Giving Testimony
Chapter on Precaution in Giving Testimony

segments: : "لاَ تَشْهَدَنَّ عَلَى شَهَادَةٍ حَتَّى تَعْرِفَهَا كَمَا تَعْرِفُ كَفَّكَ".
arabic.text: : "لاَ تَشْهَدَنَّ عَلَى شَهَادَةٍ حَتَّى تَعْرِفَهَا كَمَا تَعْرِفُ كَفَّكَ".

segments:
Hadith.3359 - It is narrated from Ali ibn Ghurab, from Abu Abdillah (as):
Imam (as) said: "Do not testify to a testimony until you know it as clearly as you know your own palm."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3359 - It is narrated from Ali ibn Ghurab, from Abu Abdillah (as):
Imam (as) said: "Do not testify to a testimony until you know it as clearly as you know your own palm."

narratorChain.raw: 3359 - رُوِيَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ غُرَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Precaution in Giving Testimony

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْمَاضِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يُشْهِدُنِي هَؤُلاَءِ عَلَى إِخْوَانِي قَالَ "نَعَمْ أَقِمِ اَلشَّهَادَةَ لَهُمْ وَ إِنْ خِفْتَ عَلَى أَخِيكَ ضَرَراً ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْمَاضِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يُشْهِدُنِي هَؤُلاَءِ عَلَى إِخْوَانِي قَالَ "نَعَمْ أَقِمِ اَلشَّهَادَةَ لَهُمْ وَ إِنْ خِفْتَ عَلَى أَخِيكَ ضَرَراً ".

segments:
Hadith.3360 - It is narrated from Ali ibn Suwayd, who said:
I said to Abu al-Hasan al-Madhi (as) (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)): "These people call me to testify against my brothers."
Imam (as) said: 'Yes, establish the testimony for them, even if you fear harm for your brother.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3360 - It is narrated from Ali ibn Suwayd, who said:
I said to Abu al-Hasan al-Madhi (as) (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)): "These people call me to testify against my brothers."
Imam (as) said: 'Yes, establish the testimony for them, even if you fear harm for your brother.'"

narratorChain.raw: وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ سُوَيْدٍ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on Precaution in Giving Testimony

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ يُشْهِدُنِي عَلَى اَلشَّهَادَةِ فَأَعْرِفُ خَطِّي وَ خَاتَمِي وَ لاَ أَذْكُرُ مِنَ اَلْبَاقِي قَلِيلاً وَ لاَ كَثِيراً فَقَالَ "إِذَا كَانَ صَاحِبُكَ ثِقَةً وَ مَعَكَ رَجُلٌ ثِقَةٌ فَاشْهَدْ لَهُ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ يُشْهِدُنِي عَلَى اَلشَّهَادَةِ فَأَعْرِفُ خَطِّي وَ خَاتَمِي وَ لاَ أَذْكُرُ مِنَ اَلْبَاقِي قَلِيلاً وَ لاَ كَثِيراً فَقَالَ "إِذَا كَانَ صَاحِبُكَ ثِقَةً وَ مَعَكَ رَجُلٌ ثِقَةٌ فَاشْهَدْ لَهُ".

segments:
Hadith.3361 - It is narrated from Umar ibn Yazid, who said:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A man calls me to testify, and I recognize my handwriting and my seal, but I do not remember anything else, whether little or much."
Imam (as) said: 'If your companion is trustworthy and you have another trustworthy man with you, then testify for him.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3361 - It is narrated from Umar ibn Yazid, who said:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A man calls me to testify, and I recognize my handwriting and my seal, but I do not remember anything else, whether little or much."
Imam (as) said: 'If your companion is trustworthy and you have another trustworthy man with you, then testify for him.'"

narratorChain.raw: وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ قَالَ:
